$comment: Copy this file to config.json and customize for your project. The launcher loads config.json from the same directory; if absent, it uses the values shown here as defaults.
$comment_projectName: Used in messages and as the default briefing-session name.
$comment_stateDir: Where last-seen-version.txt, last-briefing.log, briefing-history.log, and the issue-status cache live. Supports %USERPROFILE%, %APPDATA%, etc.
$comment_agentsMdPath: Path to the AGENTS.md file used as the briefing assistant's system prompt. Relative paths resolve against the launcher script directory.
$comment_briefingSessionName: Copilot CLI session name reused for AI summaries. Each summary appends a turn so the model can cross-reference prior briefings ('follows up on the X issue I flagged in v1.0.40').
$comment_trackedIssues: GitHub issue numbers in github/copilot-cli to monitor. When closed, the launcher prints a reminder so you can remove related workarounds.
$comment_applyKnownWorkarounds: If true, runs Repair-Win32NativeAddon (issue #3298 — /keep-alive) and Repair-CopilotSessionDanglingToolUses (aborted tool_use cleanup) on every launch. Both are idempotent and silent when nothing needs fixing.
$comment_autoUpdate: If true, runs `copilot update` before reading the version. Set false if your CLI's built-in startup auto-update is reliable enough or you're often offline.
